title: Notion MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Notion MCP Server for Claude
Read docs, update pages, and manage tasks in Notion workspaces
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Notion
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `documentation` `notion` `wiki` `notes` `knowledge-base`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status notion
```

## Config
```json
{
  "notion": {
    "url": "https://mcp.notion.com/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status notion

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/notion-mcp-server
- https://developers.notion.com/docs/mcp
